name: Onion Rye Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. FOR THE SPONGE, whisk the yeast into the water to disperse and stir into the flour until smooth. Cover and let rest for 30 minutes.
2. FOR THE DOUGH, combine the flours and form a well, placing the salt and sponge inside. Mix to form dough.
3. Knead for 8-10 minutes until smooth and elastic. Place in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise until doubled.
4. Saute the onion in oil until lightly browned. Blot off all excess oil.
5. Deflate the dough by pressing out with your hands. Gently knead in the onions and allow to rest for 10 minutes.
6. Divide the dough into 3 pieces, place in greased casseroles, and make 3 slashes in the top of each loaf. Cover with oiled plastic wrap and let rise until doubled.
7. Bake at 425°F for 20 minutes. Makes 3 loaves.
